mapper.sql: warehouse_code, inventory_status, quantity, prepare_quantity, modelno, orderNo, itemNo, supplierId, preReceiveDate, invoiceNo, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, inventory_type_code, customer_no, group_customer_no, ppl, project_code, DeptName
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.inventory_move_report
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.inventory_move_report (warehouse_code, inventory_status, quantity, prepare_quantity, modelno, orderNo, itemNo, supplierId, preReceiveDate, invoiceNo, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, inventory_type_code, customer_no, group_customer_no, ppl, project_code, DeptName) values (#{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventoryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{prepareQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prereceivedate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR})

inventory_status,

mapper.update:
update dbo.inventory_move_report
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_status = #{record.inventoryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
prepare_quantity = #{record.prepareQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
itemNo = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
supplierId = #{record.supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
preReceiveDate = #{record.prereceivedate,jdbcType=DATE},
invoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
group_customer_no = #{record.groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ppl = #{record.ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_code = #{record.projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DeptName = #{record.deptname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

update dbo.inventory_move_report set warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_status = #{record.inventoryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, prepare_quantity = #{record.prepareQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, itemNo = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, supplierId = #{record.supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, preReceiveDate = #{record.prereceivedate,jdbcType=DATE}, invoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, group_customer_no = #{record.groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ppl = #{record.ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_code = #{record.projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DeptName = #{record.deptname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}
